name: Easy Cheesy Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Creamed cottage cheese (low fat curd)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Process cottage cheese, pumpkin, egg substitute, sugar, vanilla extract, pumpkin pie spice, and salt in a bowl until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Bake until set.
5. Chill before serving.
